hooks.command: jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty)' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)' && { echo '.envファイルへのアクセスはセキュリティポリシーによりブロックされています。環境変数は直接参照してください。' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/frontend/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' || exit 0; cd /Users/sugimotoyuuhi/code/ai_agent/shachotwo-app/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -50; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/.*\.py$' || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/tests/' && exit 0; cd /Users/sugimotoyuuhi/code/ai_agent/shachotwo-app && python -m pyright "$f" 2>&1 | head -50; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/(db|routers|workers)/.*\.py$' || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/tests/' && exit 0; grep -qE '(\.from_|\.table\(|supabase)' "$f" || exit 0; grep -qE 'company_id' "$f" && exit 0; echo 'RLSテナント分離違反: supabase呼び出しにcompany_idフィルタがありません。全テーブルcompany_idベースのRLS必須（CLAUDE.md参照）。対象ファイル: '"$f" >&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: RLSテナント分離チェック中...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/(brain|workers|routers)/.*\.py$' || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/tests/' && exit 0; base='/Users/sugimotoyuuhi/code/ai_agent/shachotwo-app'; rel="${f#$base/}"; top=$(echo "$rel" | cut -d/ -f1); if [ "$top" = 'brain' ]; then mod=$(echo "$rel" | cut -d/ -f2); tf="$base/tests/brain/test_${mod}.py"; elif [ "$top" = 'workers' ]; then subdir=$(echo "$rel" | cut -d/ -f1-3); fname=$(basename "$f" .py); tf="$base/tests/$subdir/test_${fname}.py"; [ ! -f "$tf" ] && tf="$base/tests/$subdir/test_${fname}_pipeline.py"; elif [ "$top" = 'routers' ]; then fname=$(basename "$f" .py); tf="$base/tests/routers/test_${fname}.py"; fi; [ -f "$tf" ] || exit 0; cd "$base" && python -m pytest "$tf" --timeout=30 -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20; }
hooks.statusMessage: 関連テスト自動実行中...
関数名重複チェック中...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'shachotwo-app/db/migrations/.*\.sql$' || exit 0; dir=$(dirname "$f"); nums=$(ls "$dir"/*.sql 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\///' | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | sort -n); prev=0; gap=''; for n in $nums; do num=$((10#$n)); expected=$((prev + 1)); if [ "$num" -ne "$expected" ] && [ "$prev" -ne 0 ]; then gap="連番抜け: ${prev}の次が${num}"; fi; prev=$num; done; [ -z "$gap" ] && exit 0; printf 'マイグレーション連番エラー: %s' "$gap" >&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: マイグレーション連番チェック中...
UI禁止ワードチェック中...
